'''Gron Marrab''' was a male [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]]. He represented [[Calamari sector/Legends|Calamari sector]] in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] and its [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Galactic Alliance Senate|successor]]. He served on the [[Council on Security and Intelligence]].

Following the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]], Marrab was made leader of the commission to maintain and restore the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] communications networks. He accepted the help of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], and the [[Ryn Network]] reluctantly, although later admitted their help in solving the communications failures.

{{Char-stub}}
